allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "f:\\Programas\\GameTracker" -Recurse -Directory | Where-Object { $_.FullName -match '\(src|electron\)' } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName | Sort-Object)
Bash(npm install *)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs", "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\nodejs", "$env:APPDATA\\npm", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\nodejs" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName)
PowerShell(& "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\npm.cmd" --version)
PowerShell(& "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\node.exe" --version)
PowerShell($env:PATH = "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs;" + $env:PATH; Set-Location "f:\\Programas\\GameTracker"; & "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\npm.cmd" install prisma @prisma/client 2>&1)
PowerShell($env:PATH = "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs;" + $env:PATH; Set-Location "f:\\Programas\\GameTracker"; & "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\npx.cmd" prisma generate 2>&1)
PowerShell($env:PATH = "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs;" + $env:PATH; Set-Location "f:\\Programas\\GameTracker"; & "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\npm.cmd" install @libsql/client @prisma/adapter-libsql 2>&1)
PowerShell($env:PATH = "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs;" + $env:PATH; Set-Location "f:\\Programas\\GameTracker"; & "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\npx.cmd" prisma db push 2>&1)
PowerShell($env:PATH = "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs;" + $env:PATH; cd "f:\\Programas\\GameTracker"; npx prisma db push 2>&1)
PowerShell($env:PATH = "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs;" + $env:PATH; cd "f:\\Programas\\GameTracker"; npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 80)
PowerShell($env:PATH = "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs;" + $env:PATH; node -e "const m = require\('@prisma/adapter-libsql'\); console.log\(Object.keys\(m\)\)")
PowerShell($env:PATH = "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs;" + $env:PATH; cd "f:\\Programas\\GameTracker"; npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 60)
PowerShell($env:PATH = "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs;" + $env:PATH; cd "f:\\Programas\\GameTracker"; npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 40)
PowerShell($env:PATH = "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs;" + $env:PATH; cd "f:\\Programas\\GameTracker"; npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1)
PowerShell($env:PATH = "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs;" + $env:PATH; cd "f:\\Programas\\GameTracker"; npx tsc -p electron/tsconfig.json 2>&1)
PowerShell($env:PATH = "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs;" + $env:PATH; cd "f:\\Programas\\GameTracker"; npx prisma generate 2>&1)
Bash(gh auth *)
PowerShell(gh --version 2>&1)
PowerShell(winget install --id GitHub.cli --silent --accept-package-agreements --accept-source-agreements 2>&1)

PowerShell($env:PATH = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","User"\); gh --version 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 1)
